Thank you, Thiru. @AnandMahindra.

The @ChennaiCorp has cleared nearly 50 lakh metric tonnes of legacy waste out of a total of 90 lakh metric tonnes through the bio mining process. 

The remaining waste is targeted to be cleared by February 2027. We are currently implementing scientific and environm
